narrative:
Precinct Fairfield Twp (precinct in Huron County) has 681 registered voters, with 48.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.5 percentage points.
